bucket.description: The name of the S3 bucket to read objects from.

delimiter.description: A character used to group keys (like folders in a file system).

encoding_type.description: Specifies the encoding method to use for the response, such as 'url'.

fetch_owner.description: If true, includes the owner information of each object in the response.

max_keys.description: The maximum number of keys to return in the response.

prefix.description: Limits the response to keys that begin with the specified prefix.

request_payer.description: Specifies who pays for the request and data transfer costs ('requester' or 'bucket-owner').

start_after.description: Specifies the key to start with when listing objects in a bucket.
